params.name: envs
params.value:
REGISTRY_HTTP_ADDR=:443
REGISTRY_HTTP_TLS_CERTIFICATE=/etc/ssl/addon/fullchain.pem
REGISTRY_HTTP_TLS_KEY=/etc/ssl/addon/privkey.pem
REGISTRY_PROXY_REMOTEURL=https://registry-1.docker.io
REGISTRY_PROXY_USERNAME={{ DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME }}
REGISTRY_PROXY_PASSWORD={{ DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD }}
OTEL_SDK_DISABLED=true
REGISTRY_LOG_LEVEL=info
REGISTRY_LOG_FIELDS_ENVIRONMENT=production
